title: N-Hydroxy-N-p-Tolyl-N'-(2-methyl)phenyl-p-Toluamidine Hydrochloride as a Sensitive and Selective Chromogenic Reagent for Extractive Photometric Determination of Vanadium(V) in Presence of Thiocyanate
author: PRAMOD KUMAR SHARMA
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Department of Chemistry, Ravishankar University, Raipur-492 010 
 Manuscript received 24 August 1981, revised 5 November 1982, accepted 28 January 1983  

 N-Hydroxy-N- p -tolyl-N'-(2-methyl)phenyl- p -toluamidine hydrochloride (HTM­PTH) reacts with vanadium(V) in presence of thiocyanate producing chloroform extract­able coloured complex having e, 6900 l.mole -1  cm -1  at 610 nm. Common ions including Mn 2+ , Cu 2+ , Cr 3+ , Co 2+ , Ni 2+  and Zr 4+  do not interfere. The method has been applied to standard steel samples.

Common ions including Mn 2+ , Cu 2+ , Cr 3+ , Co 2+ , Ni 2+  and Zr 4+  do not interfere. The method has been applied to standard steel samples.
